sentences.english: Dear friend, I hope you are well.
sentences.hindi: प्रिय मित्र, मुझे आशा है तुम ठीक होगे।
sentences.pronunciation: dear friend i hope you are well

sentences.english: I want to tell you about my new job.
sentences.hindi: मैं तुम्हें अपनी नई नौकरी के बारे में बताना चाहता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i want to tell you about my new job

sentences.english: Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint.
sentences.hindi: आदरणीय महोदय, मैं आपको यह पत्र शिकायत के लिए लिख रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: respected sir i am writing this letter to you as a complaint

sentences.english: The condition of the road is very bad.
sentences.hindi: सड़क की हालत बहुत खराब है।
sentences.pronunciation: the condition of the road is very bad

sentences.english: Please solve this problem.
sentences.hindi: कृपया इस समस्या का समाधान करें।
sentences.pronunciation: please solve this problem

sentences.english: Dear mother, I am fine here.
sentences.hindi: प्रिय माँ, मैं यहाँ ठीक हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: dear mother i am fine here

sentences.english: I miss you a lot.
sentences.hindi: मुझे तुम्हारी बहुत याद आती है।
sentences.pronunciation: i miss you a lot

sentences.english: Your loving son.
sentences.hindi: आपका स्नेही पुत्र।
sentences.pronunciation: your loving son

sentences.english: Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter.
sentences.hindi: आदरणीय संपादक महोदय, मैं यह पत्र प्रकाशित करने का अनुरोध करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: respected editor i request you to publish this letter

sentences.english: This problem is affecting the whole city.
sentences.hindi: यह समस्या पूरे शहर को प्रभावित कर रही है।
sentences.pronunciation: this problem is affecting the whole city

sentences.english: Dear sister, congratulations on your wedding.
sentences.hindi: प्रिय बहन, तुम्हारी शादी की बधाई।
sentences.pronunciation: dear sister congratulations on your wedding

sentences.english: I will definitely come to the wedding.
sentences.hindi: मैं शादी में जरूर आऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will definitely come to the wedding

sentences.english: Respected Manager, I am writing about my order.
sentences.hindi: आदरणीय प्रबंधक महोदय, मैं अपने ऑर्डर के बारे में लिख रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: respected manager i am writing about my order

sentences.english: I received the wrong product.
sentences.hindi: मुझे गलत उत्पाद मिला है।
sentences.pronunciation: i received the wrong product

sentences.english: Please replace it as soon as possible.
sentences.hindi: कृपया इसे जल्द से जल्द बदलें।
sentences.pronunciation: please replace it as soon as possible

sentences.english: Yours faithfully, Rahul Sharma.
sentences.hindi: भवदीय, राहुल शर्मा।
sentences.pronunciation: yours faithfully rahul sharma

sentences.english: Dear friend, I received your letter.
sentences.hindi: प्रिय दोस्त, तुम्हारा पत्र मिला।
sentences.pronunciation: dear friend i received your letter

sentences.english: I will come to meet you soon.
sentences.hindi: मैं जल्द ही तुमसे मिलने आऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will come to meet you soon

sentences.english: This letter is formal.
sentences.hindi: यह पत्र औपचारिक है।
sentences.pronunciation: this letter is formal

sentences.english: This letter is informal.
sentences.hindi: यह पत्र अनौपचारिक है।
sentences.pronunciation: this letter is informal
